---
title: "Adapter Technical Specifications"
subtitle: "Per-adapter operational design, runtime profile, and control mapping"
doc-type: listing-master
canon-source: "uiao-core/canon/adapter-registry.yaml · uiao-core/canon/modernization-registry.yaml"
derived-from: "uiao-core canon (sync_canon.py)"
listing:
  id: adapter-specs
  type: table
  contents:
    - "*/ats-*.qmd"
  fields:
    - title
    - adapter-id
    - adapter-class
    - mission-class
    - status
    - phase
  sort:
    - "adapter-class asc"
    - "adapter-id asc"
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: true
  page-size: 50
  categories: true
---

# Adapter Technical Specifications {.unnumbered}

This tree holds one **Adapter Technical Specification (ATS)** per adapter registered in `uiao-core` canon. Each ATS describes the adapter's operational design, runtime profile, scope, and NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 control mapping.

::: {.callout-note}
## Canon-derived tree

Every ATS in this tree is scaffolded by `uiao-core/tools/sync_canon.py` from the two adapter registries. Frontmatter metadata (`adapter-id`, `adapter-class`, `mission-class`, `status`, `phase`, `gcc-boundary`) is regenerated from canon on every sync and must not be hand-edited. Authored content lives under the `## Overview` heading and below in each document.
:::

## What to read by role

| Role | Start with |
|---|---|
| **Authorizing officials / assessors** | Any ATS `## Controls` and `## Canon invariants` sections for the adapters in scope for the system being authorized. |
| **Customers** | Any ATS `## Overview` and `## Scope` sections for the adapters deployed in their tenancy. |
| **Technical leads** | The full ATS plus the companion [Adapter Validation Suite](../adapter-validation-suites/index.qmd) document for each adapter. |

## Taxonomy

Adapters are segmented along two orthogonal axes:

| Axis | Values | Source |
|---|---|---|
| **Operational class** (`adapter-class`) | `modernization` · `conformance` | `uiao-core/canon/{modernization,adapter}-registry.yaml` |
| **Doctrinal mission class** (`mission-class`) | `identity` · `telemetry` · `policy` · `enforcement` · `unmapped` · `mixed` | `uiao-core/canon/UIAO_003_Adapter_Segmentation_Overview_v1.0.md` §4 |

See `uiao-core/ARCHITECTURE.md` §3.2 (Adapter registry schema — dual-axis taxonomy) for the full rationale. The `unmapped` mission class is carried pending resolution of ODA-15.

## All adapters

The table below is generated automatically by Quarto from the ATS documents in this tree. Filter and sort controls are active.

:::{#adapter-specs}
:::

---

*Scaffolded by `uiao-core/tools/sync_canon.py`. See `uiao-core/ARCHITECTURE.md` §4 for the cross-repo sync contract.*
